event.intent: Converge TBOS command semantics behind one structured command-runtime API shared by hosted, tier/persona, GUI, and future bare-metal frontends.

pixel.display_logic: Render this development action as an inspectable JSON record with STEPPPS dimensions visible.

prompt.text: Implement the smallest shared command-runtime vertical slice: define a structured result API, route one representative command through both the macOS hosted shell and a second frontend, prove identical results, preserve platform/persona/capability separation, then verify both governance chains.
prompt.next_genai_prompt: Continue from this STEPPPS context: Converge TBOS command semantics behind one structured command-runtime API shared by hosted, tier/persona, GUI, and future bare-metal frontends. Create or update the next dev-action, preserve all seven dimensions, then verify the dev chain.

verification: Execute the same command sequence through two frontends and compare identical structured results; verify canonical conformance and the development chain.

enterprise_context.business_value: Keep TBOS development auditable, restartable, and connected to the current intent: Converge TBOS command semantics behind one structured command-runtime API shared by hosted, tier/persona, GUI, and future bare-metal frontends.
enterprise_context.risk: Agents may generate structurally valid but context-poor STEPPPS actions.
acceptance_criteria: The dev-action names concrete files or registry paths.
The intent explains why the change matters.
The next prompt preserves enterprise context for the next agent.
Verification proves schema and chain integrity.
